description: Credit amount divided by loan duration in months. Proxy for monthly credit intensity.
Log transformation of credit amount to reduce skewness.
Indicator equal to 1 when loan duration is 36 months or longer.
Indicator equal to 1 when credit amount is above or equal to the 75th percentile.
Installment rate multiplied by credit amount. Proxy for repayment burden.
Borrower lifecycle group based on age.
Loan maturity group based on duration in months.
Exposure group based on credit amount quartiles.
